ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Conference
Off Calendar Oct-07-2024 Continued To Dec-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):
William Rogers, Esq., for Anne Contreras, Petitioner.
Bob Cross, Esq., for Emeline Contreras, Beneficiary.
Jodi Phillips, Esq., for Sonia Contreras, Beneficiary.
Deb Fox, Esq., for Margaret Pinckard, Successor Trustee.

At the court's query, counsels offer an update regarding the status of the matter specifically regarding mediation. The court acknowledges the request to set the matter for trial but believes that the parties shoud return to mediation first. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The court advises that it will execute an order thereon.

At the conclusion of discussion, the subject matter is continued to Dec-09-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

***After hearing (Oct-07-2024): The Court signed the minute order referring case to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than Nov-25-2024. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by Dec-02-2024. The Parties are to return on Dec-09-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. Order shall be served on counsels via U.S. mail.

Petition For An Order That: 1) Removes Co-Trustee Emeline A. Contreras-Forrest; 2) Fixes The Compensation Of Trutee At Zero; 3) Confirms The Appointment Of Trustee; 4) Compels An Accounting; 5) Suspends Trustee Pending The Hearing On The Instant Petition For Removal
Off Calendar May-06-2024 Continued To Aug-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Conference On The Underlying Petition
Off Calendar Jan-08-2024 Continued To May-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Rogers appeared by zoom for Annie Contreras (petitioner).
Robert Cross appeared by zoom for Emeline Contreras.
Jodi Philips appeared by zoom for Sonia Contreras.

Mr. Rogers stated that they were successful with the mediation session, but further mediation with Bette Epstein is appropriate, that the settlor died last week and that it is appropriate to push the matter into the future so that the family can grieve their loss. Mr. Rogers also stated that there is a new trust in place, that the new trustee is finding their way in this case and requested 90 to 120 days. Mrs. Philips stated that Margaret Pinkard is working her way through the accounting. The Petition for an Order that Removes Co-Trustee, etc., and the status conference are continued to May 6, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition For An Order That: 1) Removes Co-Trustee Emeline A. Contreras-Forrest; 2) Fixes The Compensation Of Trutee At Zero; 3) Confirms The Appointment Of Trustee; 4) Compels An Accounting; 5) Suspends Trustee Pending The Hearing On The Instant Petition For Removal
Off Calendar Aug-14-2023 Continued To Oct-30-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: William Rogers appearing via zoom for Anne Contreras (petitioner).
Robert Cross in person for and with Emeline Contreras-Forrest and Antonina Contreras (co-trustee).
Jodi Phillips appearing via zoom for Sonia Contreras (beneficiary).

Discussion was held regarding pro-bono mediation, that trustee should be removed because of a domestic violence restraining order, that monies were borrowed from the trust for a personal loan with no promissory note or loan terms provided, and that Emeline has been living in the Reno home rent free. The Court suggested pro-bono mediation to help resolve the matters. The Court also issuesd an interim suspension to Emeline Contreras-Forrest as co/trustee.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than October 13, 2023. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by October 20, 2023. The matter is continued to October 30, 2023 and the Parties are to return on 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

The joint status report is to address status of mediation, any outstanding discovery issues and timelines, what the claims are, the factual issues, the time estimate of the evidentiary hearing, who the witnesses will be and time estimates of witness testimony.

First amended petition for an order that removes co-trustee Emeline A. Contreras-Forrest etc., is also continued to October 30, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
